title: VendorPrequalification
description: A firm's request to prequalify with DDC and express interest in a solicitation — the net-new WRITE surface for this vendor-facing agency. DDC serves vendors and client agencies, not the public: there is NO citizen write anywhere in the domain, and even the vendor onboarding transaction is not DDC-owned — it lives in the citywide PASSPort platform run by MOCS. This schema models the prequalification/expression-of-interest submission (plus an optional City Record notification subscription) so an owned DDC API can front that citywide flow. It serves both the write surface (submit) and the read surface (status of a submission).

prequalificationId.description: Server-assigned submission id. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Review status. Set by DDC/MOCS, not the submitter.

role.description: Role the firm is prequalifying for.

solicitationPin.description: PIN of a specific solicitation the firm is expressing interest in, if any.

passportVendorId.description: Existing PASSPort vendor id, if the firm is already enrolled citywide.

capabilities.description: Free-text description of the firm's relevant capabilities / past performance.

subscribeCityRecord.description: Also register for City Record email notifications of matching DDC solicitations.
